messages.author: 🐼 Wrathpanda
messages.text: Its pretty lonely out here with my single repeater. Anyone else in Boulder, CO??
messages.content_html: Its pretty lonely out here with my single repeater. Anyone else in Boulder, CO??

messages.author: 🐼 Wrathpanda
messages.text: Yeah - I am one of them. Just put it up.
messages.content_html: Yeah - I am one of them. Just put it up.

messages.author: JB 🦉
messages.text: I just put one up in Lafayette
messages.content_html: I just put one up in Lafayette

messages.author: 3one5
messages.text: I just put one up on the East side of Eaton. I'm going to place another in Eaton. For a brief moment I picked up a repeater SW of Eaton which then made it into Loveland. Loveland appears to have a number of repeaters. I'll be putting up another tomorrow near the intersection of 34 and I25. I would really like to get a reliable bridge between Eaton and the Front Range area. Anyone have any experience getting owners of tall structures to let you put a node up?
messages.content_html: I just put one up on the East side of Eaton. I'm going to place another in Eaton. For a brief moment I picked up a repeater SW of Eaton which then made it into Loveland. Loveland appears to have a number of repeaters. I'll be putting up another tomorrow near the intersection of 34 and I25. I would really like to get a reliable bridge between Eaton and the Front Range area. Anyone have any experience getting owners of tall structures to let you put a node up?

messages.author: budt W0RMT
messages.text: I've got one in Louisville and we are working on identifying some sites to connect over into the Boulder valley. @🐼 Wrathpanda let me know if you have any sites you would like to see for repeaters.
